Document:
The Burstworm is an explosive addition to the parasites that specializes in instantaneous mass conversion of groups. When they are killed, their body will wriggle visibly before exploding in a ring of 16 parasites.
If a non-parasite is struck by one of these parasitic projectiles, it will burrow into their body after a short delay, converting them into another Burstworm.
Any worms that failed to find a mark will quickly die, falling to the ground as evidence of possible conversion.
